mapper.select: SELECT id, config_id, min_distance_km, max_distance_km, fee, sort, create_time, update_time FROM system_config_delivery_tier WHERE config_id = #{configId} ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO system_config_delivery_tier (config_id, min_distance_km, max_distance_km, fee, sort) VALUES
(#{item.configId}, #{item.minDistanceKm}, #{item.maxDistanceKm}, #{item.fee}, #{item.sort})
